name: Geothermal Tap Mesh
blurb: RFID-tagged sensor nodes map subsurface heat flow in real time for precision geothermal drilling.

name: Photonic RFID Reader
blurb: Replaces radio-wave tag interrogation with photonic chips, enabling terahertz-speed inventory scanning.

name: Superfluid Neural Fabric
blurb: Neuromorphic chips cooled to superfluid helium temperatures achieve near-zero-energy synaptic switching.

name: Frictionless Swarm Router
blurb: Agents coordinate through superfluid-analog communication channels with zero message-loss overhead.

name: Reactor Operations Oracle
blurb: Foundation model monitors sensor feeds across a nuclear plant and predicts anomalies before they escalate.

name: Graphene Materials Synthesizer
blurb: Foundation model predicts novel graphene derivatives and generates validated synthesis protocols autonomously.

name: Perovskite Efficiency Optimizer
blurb: Foundation model iterates perovskite crystal compositions to maximize solar cell efficiency in simulation.

name: Contextual AR Narrator
blurb: Foundation model annotates the real world in real time, surfacing relevant facts in your field of view.

name: Holographic Scene Architect
blurb: Foundation model generates photorealistic holographic environments on demand from text descriptions.

name: Culturally Grounded Translator
blurb: Foundation model translates language while adapting idiom, register, and cultural context simultaneously.

name: Autonomous DeFi Steward
blurb: Intelligent agents execute, audit, and rebalance decentralized financial contracts without human approval.

name: Gene-Edit Validation Agent
blurb: Autonomous agent designs CRISPR guide RNAs, predicts off-targets, and flags unsafe edits before lab use.

name: Quantum State Courier Agent
blurb: Intelligent agent orchestrates quantum teleportation channels to route entangled qubits between nodes.

name: Adaptive Scan Planner
blurb: Agent dynamically adjusts CT scan parameters per patient, minimising radiation while maximising image clarity.

name: Embodied Task Delegation
blurb: Intelligent agents assign, monitor, and hand off physical tasks between fleets of humanoid robots.

name: Orbital Mission Controller
blurb: Autonomous agent manages uplink scheduling and collision avoidance across an entire satellite constellation.

name: Nano-Embedded Smart Textile
blurb: Nanostructures woven into fabric give wearables molecular-level biosensing without added bulk or weight.

name: Predictive Maglev Controller
blurb: AI optimises levitation gaps and switch routing across an entire maglev network in real time.

name: Vacuum Tube Traffic Brain
blurb: AI schedules pod dispatch, pressure zoning, and emergency braking across vactrain networks globally.

name: Therapeutic Clone Compiler
blurb: Patient-specific cloned tissue is gene-therapy corrected before transplant, eliminating both rejection and disease.

name: Clonal Organ Power Cell
blurb: Bio-cloned tissue engineered to generate ionic electricity, powering implanted devices indefinitely.

name: Sodium-Buffered Grid Storage
blurb: Sodium-ion batteries absorb excess nuclear baseload power for smooth grid delivery during demand spikes.

name: Geothermal Energy Token
blurb: Blockchain ledger proves geothermal kilowatt-hour origin, enabling tradeable low-carbon energy certificates.

name: Thermophile Genome Editor
blurb: CRISPR tools adapted to extremophile bacteria enhance geothermal microbe efficiency for mineral extraction.

name: Thermal State Teleporter
blurb: Quantum teleportation relays carry sensor data from deep geothermal probes to surface stations losslessly.

name: Subsurface CT Mapper
blurb: CT-inspired tomography reconstructs underground rock and fluid structures to guide geothermal well placement.

name: Geothermal Drill Operative
blurb: Humanoid robots descend into high-temperature boreholes to inspect and repair geothermal equipment autonomously.

name: Heat Plume Satellite Survey
blurb: Satellite constellation maps global subsurface thermal gradients to identify exploitable geothermal sites.

name: Photonic Document Relay
blurb: Photonic chips transmit scanned documents at optical bandwidth, making fax latency essentially zero.

name: Solar Credit Microchain
blurb: Perovskite panels log every watt-hour on-chain, enabling peer-to-peer solar energy trading at household scale.

name: Nuclear Tokenized Grid
blurb: SMR output is metered and tokenized on blockchain, creating real-time tradeable atomic-energy certificates.

name: Spike-Driven Robot Reflex
blurb: Neuromorphic spiking circuits give robots sub-millisecond reflexes at a fraction of conventional compute power.

name: Hybrid Spiking Deep Net
blurb: Combines neuromorphic spiking layers with dense neural networks to cut training energy by orders of magnitude.

name: Sparse Expert Neuron Router
blurb: Neuromorphic hardware routes inputs to mixture-of-experts sub-networks using spike timing instead of attention.

name: In-Tube Edge Processor

name: Neuromorphic Battery Interface
blurb: Spiking chips monitor LFP cell health state-by-state, predicting failure weeks before it occurs.

name: Orbital Fiber Uplink Node
blurb: Photonic chips embedded in the space elevator tether relay data between ground and orbit at terabit speeds.

name: Corrective Germline Therapy
blurb: Genetic engineering rewrites inherited mutations before gene therapy delivers corrected sequences to target tissue.

name: Electrogenic Organism Battery
blurb: Genetically engineered microbes produce electricity via ion pumps, creating living bio-electrochemical cells.

name: Fullerene Bearing Rail
blurb: Fullerene molecular bearings coat maglev guide rails, eliminating residual contact friction at guideway joints.

name: Metabolic Transit Therapy
blurb: Maglev cabins deliver gene therapy aerosols to passengers during travel, treating chronic conditions en route.

name: Rail-Embedded Data Store
blurb: Magnetic storage encoded in maglev rail surfaces caches routing data retrievable by passing train sensors.

name: Fusion-Powered Maglev Grid
blurb: Fusion reactor baseload powers maglev networks continuously, eliminating catenary and substation infrastructure.

name: MRI-Guided Gene Delivery
blurb: Magnetic fields from an MRI scanner steer gene-therapy nanoparticles to precise anatomical targets in real time.

name: Implant-Powered MRI Beacon
blurb: LFP battery implants power miniature MRI-compatible coils for continuous in-body imaging without external fields.

name: Cold Fusion Glucose Cell

name: Metabolic Cognition Mirror
blurb: AGI interprets real-time glucose data to infer cognitive state and recommend personalised interventions.

name: Glycemic Wearable Mesh

name: Diabetic Co-Pilot System
blurb: Autonomous vehicle reads passenger glucose levels and adjusts cabin conditions or reroutes to care if needed.

name: Graphene-Coated Sodium Cell
blurb: Graphene anodes in sodium-ion batteries triple charge rate while preventing electrode degradation over cycles.

name: Immersive Surgical Gene Guide

name: Haptic Resistance VR Kit

name: Tube-Maintenance Robot Fleet

name: Epigenetic Wearable Monitor
blurb: Wearable sensors track gene-expression biomarkers to assess whether CRISPR edits are expressing as intended.

name: Quantum Key Constellation
blurb: Satellite constellation distributes quantum-encrypted keys globally using entanglement, making interception detectable.

name: Carbon Credit Identity Layer
blurb: Biometric identity ties individuals to their personal carbon offset records, preventing double-claiming.

name: Fullerene Photonic Coupler
blurb: Fullerene molecules act as nano-scale optical cavities, coupling photons between photonic chip waveguides.

name: Brain-State Expert Selector
blurb: EEG signals gate which mixture-of-experts sub-network responds, adapting AI output to the user's cognitive load.

name: Lattice-Confined Solar Fusion
blurb: Perovskite crystal lattices host cold-fusion-inspired hydrogen loading, supplementing photovoltaic output speculatively.

name: Prosthetic Swarm Coordinator

blurb: Immutable chain records each sodium-ion cell's charge cycle history, enabling trustworthy second-life resale markets.

name: AGI Therapeutic Gene Planner

name: Mobile Gene Dispensary

name: Liquid Biopsy Expert Panel
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model routes circulating DNA fragments to cancer-type specialist sub-networks for precise diagnosis.

name: Transit Oncology Screen

name: Self-Powered Biopsy Implant

name: Adaptive Battery Learning Loop
blurb: Machine learning model continuously refines LFP charging profiles per cell, extending pack lifetime significantly.

name: Battery Language Interface
blurb: NLP system interprets plain-language queries about battery state and returns actionable diagnostics in conversational form.
